quantization: awq_marlin (4-bit) + BF16 shared_expert_gate + BF16 in_proj_a/b + BF16 vision tower

tuning_experiments.name: triton attention backend
tuning_experiments.verdict: worse than flashinfer on Ampere; R9700's flat 20 tok/s @131K is ROCm-triton-specific

tuning_experiments.name: R9700-style tunables (CHUNKED=8192 DECODE_STEPS=32 MAMBA_CACHE=8 MAX_RUNNING=8)
tuning_experiments.verdict: no single-user decode benefit; kept in preset for future multi-user work

comparison_R9700.note: ROCm triton kernel holds flat at long-ctx; Ampere flashinfer does not. Architecture not fungible.
